title: Stockton Chapter #71 (NADE) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Combined Constitution and By-Laws of the Stockton Chapter (#71) of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE), a California chapter. Covers name and affiliation, purposes, membership (NADE membership only, no chapter dues), organization with officers President/Vice-President/Secretary/Treasurer plus the immediate Past President on the Executive Board, bi-monthly general membership meetings on the second Tuesday with proxy/electronic voting, nominations and elections at the January annual business meeting, standing committees (Membership and Fundraising, Communications, Education, Constitution and By-Laws), parliamentary authority, and constitutional amendment by two-thirds vote.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Stockton (California) Chapter
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Stockton Chapter #71 of NADE

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Cal-Stock-Const-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory. The document is footer-stamped 'Drafted 1/22/2010', so temporal_coverage start/end are set to 2010. Conversion artifact: the very first line of the .md contains stray injected text 'Be Active Challenge [beactivechallenge@ncsports.org]' immediately before the real title — a spurious header/clipboard artifact from the markitdown conversion, not part of the governing document. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
